hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; db_url="${DATABASE_URL:-$(grep -E '^DATABASE_URL=' .env 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d= -f2-)}"; rl_url="${RATE_LIMITER_URL:-$(grep -E '^RATE_LIMITER_URL=' .env 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d= -f2-)}"; pg_port=$(printf '%s' "$db_url" | sed -En 's#.*:([0-9]+)(/.*)?$#\1#p'); vk_port=$(printf '%s' "$rl_url" | sed -En 's#.*:([0-9]+)(/.*)?$#\1#p'); pg_port="${pg_port:-5433}"; vk_port="${vk_port:-6380}"; pg=$(nc -z localhost "$pg_port" 2>/dev/null && echo 1 || echo 0); vk=$(nc -z localhost "$vk_port" 2>/dev/null && echo 1 || echo 0); if [ "$pg" = "0" ] || [ "$vk" = "0" ]; then missing=""; [ "$pg" = "0" ] && missing="$missing postgres($pg_port)"; [ "$vk" = "0" ] && missing="$missing valkey($vk_port)"; jq -n --arg m "$missing" '{systemMessage: ("Docker services not reachable:" + $m + ". Run: docker compose up -d"), hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext: ("Dev env warning: missing services:" + $m + ". DB-touching commands will fail until services are up.")}}'; fi; exit 0

cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; db_url="${DATABASE_URL:-$(grep -E '^DATABASE_URL=' .env 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d= -f2-)}"; pg_port=$(printf '%s' "$db_url" | sed -En 's#.*:([0-9]+)(/.*)?$#\1#p'); pg_port="${pg_port:-5433}"; nc -z localhost "$pg_port" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; out=$(cargo check --quiet 2>&1); rc=$?; [ $rc -ne 0 ] && printf '%s' "$out" | tail -30 | jq -Rs '{systemMessage: ("cargo check failed at Stop:\n" + .)}'; exit 0
